questionHtml: State one way in which a physical property of HDPE, other than density, differs from that of LDPE as a result of this structural difference.
markschemeHtml:
HDPE is more rigid/less flexible

OR

HDPE has a higher melting point

OR

HDPE has greater «tensile» strength

 

Accept “HDPE has lower ductility”.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one way in which a physical property of HDPE, other than density, differs from that of LDPE as a result of this structural difference.
